title: Comprehensive atlas integration for single-cell RNA-seq analysis
abstract: We describe atlas integration strategies for large single-cell RNA-seq studies and compare harmonization methods.

title: Single-cell RNA-seq normalization with probabilistic latent variables
abstract: A latent-variable method for normalization and denoising in single-cell expression matrices.

title: Atlas-scale integration benchmarks for multimodal single-cell data
abstract: We benchmark atlas integration pipelines across RNA and ATAC modalities with harmonized metrics.

title: Protein language models for enzyme engineering
abstract: A protein-language-model workflow for sequence-to-function prediction in enzymes.

title: Differential abundance testing for spatial transcriptomics
abstract: A workflow for spatial transcriptomics region testing and uncertainty-aware inference.
